THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACHERS, PENELOPE J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1170A HAMPSHIRE ST., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, ENFORCEMENT & EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED PROVIDED DEFT. COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS OF AGREEMENT; IF DEFT. COMPLIES PLTF. WILL VACATE & SET ASIDE JUDGMENT, AND AGREES TO DISMISS CASE W/PREJ; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS).
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIAS, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BACHERS, PENELOPE J. DOES 1 TO IV, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
